title: (Bullish Signal) CRSP enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Apr 20, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that CRSP's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 74 similar cases where CRSP's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 63 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 85%. Current price $124.24 crossed the support line at $112.91 and is trading between $129.13 resistance and $112.91 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/18/21 - 04/20/21, the price experienced a -2% Downtrend, while the week of 04/13/21 - 04/20/21 shows a +0.65% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/bhjoo4z1dku61.png?width=1528&format=png&auto=webp&s=a1b59cda47e5ec0cee7c85724afd7badd262b453

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 48 of 56 cases where CRSP's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on April 20, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on CRSP as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 63 of 74 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for CRSP just turned positive on March 31, 2021. Looking at past instances where CRSP's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. shows that in 34 of 42 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 81%.

Following a +2.46% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where CRSP advanced for three days, in 262 of 306 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 86%.
